facility: Greater Baltimore Medical Center — Emergency Department
indication: Preoperative chest radiograph prior to urgent surgery.
technique: Single portable AP view of the chest.
findings: Lungs clear without consolidation, effusion, or pneumothorax. Normal cardiomediastinal silhouette; NO cardiomegaly. No pulmonary edema. No free air under the hemidiaphragms on this projection (note: free intraperitoneal air is better assessed on the concurrent CT). Bony thorax intact.
impression: No acute cardiopulmonary process. Normal heart size. No pulmonary edema or effusion.
comparison: No prior chest radiograph on file.
